headline: Treasury Yields, Dollar Rise Amid Inflation Concerns
summary: Treasury yields keep rising while the dollar strengthens as the conflict in the Middle East rages on. Rising energy prices stoke inflation fears and support bets on a longer hold on interest rates by the Fed.

headline: Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) Stands Out as a Dependable Dividend Stock
summary: ADP offers a reliable 3.1% dividend yield with a strong history of increases, backed by excellent earnings and a stable business model for income investors.
